parameters.query: SELECT i.id, i.user_id, i.indicator_type, i.company_name, i.company_id, i.reason, i.sentiment_score, i.source_url, i.source_platform, i.raw_snippet, i.detected_at FROM winloss.indicators i WHERE (i.meta->>'status') = 'classified' AND i.detected_at >= now() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM research.voc_entries v WHERE v.user_id = i.user_id AND v.source_url = i.source_url ) ORDER BY i.detected_at DESC LIMIT 100;

INSERT INTO research.voc_entries (user_id, dimension, text, source_url, source_platform, persona, funnel_stage, raw_snippet, trend, frequency, first_seen, last_seen, meta) VALUES ('{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.dimension }}', '{{ $json.text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.source_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.source_platform }}', {{ $json.persona ? "'" + $json.persona.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.funnel_stage ? "'" + $json.funnel_stage + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.raw_snippet ? "'" + $json.raw_snippet.replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 2000) + "'" : 'NULL' }}, 'stable', 1, now(), now(), '{"source": "winloss_classifier"}'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (user_id, source_url) DO UPDATE SET dimension = EXCLUDED.dimension, text = EXCLUDED.text, funnel_stage = EXCLUDED.funnel_stage, updated_at = now();
